data: {"generalSituation":"A trough of low pressure will linger over the coast of southern China to the northern part of the South China Sea in the next couple of days. There will be showers and squally thunderstorms over the region. With the trough of low pressure departing from the coast of Guangdong and the subtropical ridge covering southern China, showers will ease off gradually and the weather will become very hot over Guangdong early to midweek next week. A broad trough of low pressure is expected to bring unsettled weather to the central and northern parts of the South China Sea in the latter part of next week. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Mekkhala will move across the seas south of Japan in the next couple of days, and transform into an extratropical cyclone gradually. Tropical Cyclone Higos will edge closer to the vicinity of Honshu of Japan today and tomorrow.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260627","week":"Saturday","forecastWind":"Southwest force 2 to 3.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with showers and a few squally thunderstorms.
